plugin_desc: Albentia Systems WiMAX / AerDOCSIS wireless SNMP child template (ALBENTIA-AS-MIB, enterprise PEN 28087). The source queue confirms private Albentia telemetry for sector temperature, clients, frequency, distance and power, but the exact raw MIB object list is not present in this worktree; without row-filter-free OIDs, those private temperature/client/radio/link health metrics are N/A and not faked. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Wireless SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics and aggregate traffic through the generic snmp/wireless metric model while this plugin provides the Albentia collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template. Applicable to Albentia wireless base stations / access devices and other IF-MIB compliant wireless devices.
name: Wireless

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
